_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: FiveM QBCore
author: Burkaq
description: FiveM sunucu egg'i — QBCore framework otomatik kurulumu, artifact güncelleme, Git ve txAdmin desteği.
startup: TERM=dumb $(pwd)/alpine/opt/cfx-server/ld-musl-x86_64.so.1 --library-path "$(pwd)/alpine/usr/lib/v8/:$(pwd)/alpine/lib/:$(pwd)/alpine/usr/lib/" -- $(pwd)/alpine/opt/cfx-server/FXServer +set citizen_dir $(pwd)/alpine/opt/cfx-server/citizen/ +set sv_licenseKey "{{FIVEM_LICENSE}}" +set steam_webApiKey "{{STEAM_WEBAPIKEY}}" +set sv_maxClients {{MAX_PLAYERS}} +sv_hostname "{{SERVER_HOSTNAME}}" +sets sv_projectName "{{SERVER_PNAME}}" +sets sv_projectDesc "{{SERVER_PDESC}}" +set onesync {{ONESYNC_ENABLED}} +setr voice_use3dAudio {{VOICE_USE3DAUDIO}} +setr voice_useSendingRangeOnly {{VOICE_USESENDINGRANGEONLY}} +setr voice_useNativeAudio {{VOICE_USENATIVEAUDIO}} +set sv_enforceGameBuild {{SV_GAMEBUILD}} $( [ "$TXADMIN_ENABLE" == "1" ] || printf %s '+exec server.cfg' )

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# FiveM + QBCore Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
apt update -y
apt install -y tar xz-utils curl git file jq unzip

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

RELEASE_PAGE=$(curl -sSL https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_proot_linux/master/)
CHANGELOGS_PAGE=$(curl -sSL https://changelogs-live.fivem.net/api/changelog/versions/linux/server)

QBCORE_ENABLED="${QBCORE_ENABLED:-1}"
SERVER_CFG_URL="${SERVER_CFG_URL:-https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Burkaq/fivemegg/main/fivem/server.cfg}"

clone_repo() {
  local dest="$1"
  local branch="$2"
  local url="$3"

  if [ -d "$dest" ]; then
    echo "Skipping existing resource: $dest"
    return 0
  fi

  mkdir -p "$(dirname "$dest")"
  echo "Cloning $url -> $dest"
  git clone --depth 1 --single-branch --branch "$branch" "$url" "$dest" \
    && echo "Cloned: $dest" \
    || echo "Failed to clone: $dest"
}

install_qbcore_resources() {
  echo "Installing QBCore Framework resources..."

  mkdir -p resources/[cfx-default] resources/[standalone] resources/[voice] resources/[defaultmaps] resources/[qb] tmp/files

  echo "Downloading qbcore.sql..."
  curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/qbcore-framework/txAdminRecipe/main/qbcore.sql -o qbcore.sql

  echo "Downloading CFX default resources..."
  git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/citizenfx/cfx-server-data.git /tmp/cfx-server-data \
    && cp -Rf /tmp/cfx-server-data/resources/* resources/[cfx-default]/ \
    || echo "Failed to download CFX default resources."
  rm -rf resources/[cfx-default]/[gameplay]/chat 2>/dev/null || true

  echo "Downloading oxmysql..."
  curl -sSL https://github.com/overextended/oxmysql/releases/download/v2.14.1/oxmysql.zip -o tmp/files/oxmysql.zip
  unzip -qo tmp/files/oxmysql.zip -d resources/[standalone]

  echo "Downloading menuv..."
  curl -sSL https://github.com/ThymonA/menuv/releases/download/v1.4.1/menuv_v1.4.1.zip -o tmp/menuv.zip
  mkdir -p resources/[standalone]/menuv
  unzip -qo tmp/menuv.zip -d resources/[standalone]/menuv

  clone_repo "resources/[standalone]/bob74_ipl" "master" "https://github.com/qbcore-framework/bob74_ipl"
  clone_repo "resources/[standalone]/safecracker" "main" "https://github.com/qbcore-framework/safecracker"
  clone_repo "resources/[standalone]/screenshot-basic" "master" "https://github.com/citizenfx/screenshot-basic"
  clone_repo "resources/[standalone]/progressbar" "main" "https://github.com/qbcore-framework/progressbar"
  clone_repo "resources/[standalone]/interact-sound" "master" "https://github.com/qbcore-framework/interact-sound"
  clone_repo "resources/[standalone]/connectqueue" "master" "https://github.com/qbcore-framework/connectqueue"
  clone_repo "resources/[standalone]/PolyZone" "master" "https://github.com/qbcore-framework/PolyZone"

  sleep 5

  clone_repo "resources/[voice]/pma-voice" "main" "https://github.com/AvarianKnight/pma-voice"
  clone_repo "resources/[voice]/qb-radio" "main" "https://github.com/qbcore-framework/qb-radio"

  clone_repo "resources/[defaultmaps]/hospital_map" "main" "https://github.com/qbcore-framework/hospital_map"
  clone_repo "resources/[defaultmaps]/dealer_map" "main" "https://github.com/qbcore-framework/dealer_map"
  clone_repo "resources/[defaultmaps]/[prison_map]" "main" "https://github.com/qbcore-framework/prison_map"

  sleep 5

  local qb_repos=(
    "qb-core"
    "qb-scoreboard"
    "qb-adminmenu"
    "qb-multicharacter"
    "qb-target"
    "qb-vehiclesales"
    "qb-vehicleshop"
    "qb-houserobbery"
    "qb-prison"
    "qb-hud"
    "qb-management"
    "qb-weed"
    "qb-lapraces"
    "qb-inventory"
    "qb-houses"
    "qb-garages"
    "qb-ambulancejob"
    "qb-radialmenu"
    "qb-crypto"
    "qb-weathersync"
    "qb-policejob"
    "qb-apartments"
    "qb-vehiclekeys"
    "qb-mechanicjob"
    "qb-phone"
    "qb-vineyard"
    "qb-weapons"
    "qb-scrapyard"
    "qb-towjob"
    "qb-streetraces"
    "qb-storerobbery"
    "qb-spawn"
    "qb-smallresources"
    "qb-recyclejob"
    "qb-crafting"
    "qb-diving"
    "qb-cityhall"
    "qb-truckrobbery"
    "qb-pawnshop"
    "qb-minigames"
    "qb-taxijob"
    "qb-busjob"
    "qb-newsjob"
    "qb-fuel"
    "qb-jewelery"
    "qb-bankrobbery"
    "qb-banking"
    "qb-clothing"
    "qb-hotdogjob"
    "qb-doorlock"
    "qb-garbagejob"
    "qb-drugs"
    "qb-shops"
    "qb-interior"
    "qb-menu"
    "qb-input"
    "qb-loading"
  )

  local repo
  local count=0
  for repo in "${qb_repos[@]}"; do
    clone_repo "resources/[qb]/${repo}" "main" "https://github.com/qbcore-framework/${repo}"
    count=$((count + 1))
    if [ $((count % 8)) -eq 0 ]; then
      sleep 5
    fi
  done

  rm -rf /tmp/cfx-server-data tmp/files tmp/menuv
  echo "QBCore resource installation complete."
  echo "IMPORTANT: Import qbcore.sql into your MySQL/MariaDB database before starting the server."
}

# Check wether to run installation or update version of script
if [ ! -d "./alpine/" ] && [ ! -d "./resources/" ]; then
  echo "Beginning installation of new FiveM server."

  if [[ "${FIVEM_VERSION}" == "recommended" ]] || [[ -z ${FIVEM_VERSION} ]]; then
    DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(echo $CHANGELOGS_PAGE | jq -r '.recommended_download')
  elif [[ "${FIVEM_VERSION}" == "latest" ]]; then
    DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(echo $CHANGELOGS_PAGE | jq -r '.latest_download')
  else
    VERSION_LINK=$(echo -e "${RELEASE_PAGE}" | grep -Eo '".*/*.tar.xz"' | grep -Eo '".*/*.tar.xz"' | sed 's/\"//g'  | sed 's/\.\///1' | grep -i "${FIVEM_VERSION}" | grep -o =.* |  tr -d '=')
    if [[ "${VERSION_LINK}" == "" ]]; then
      echo -e "Defaulting to recommended as the version requested was invalid."
      DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(echo $CHANGELOGS_PAGE | jq -r '.recommended_download')
    else
      DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(echo https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_proot_linux/master/${VERSION_LINK})
    fi
  fi

  echo -e "Running curl -sSL ${DOWNLOAD_LINK} -o ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}..."
  curl -sSL ${DOWNLOAD_LINK} -o ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}

  echo "Extracting FiveM/RedM FXServer artifact files..."
  FILETYPE=$(file -F ',' ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/} | cut -d',' -f2 | cut -d' ' -f2)
  if [ "$FILETYPE" == "gzip" ]; then
    tar xzvf ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}
  elif [ "$FILETYPE" == "Zip" ]; then
    unzip ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}
  elif [ "$FILETYPE" == "XZ" ]; then
    tar xvf ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}
  else
    echo -e "Downloaded artifact of unknown filetype. Exiting."
    exit 2
  fi

  rm -rf ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/} run.sh

  if [ -e server.cfg ]; then
    echo "Server config file already exists. Skipping download of new one."
  else
    echo "Downloading QBCore server config..."
    curl -sSL "${SERVER_CFG_URL}" -o server.cfg
  fi

  if [ "${GIT_ENABLED}" == "1" ] && [ ! -d "/mnt/server/resources" ]; then
    echo "Preparing to clone resources repo from git."

    if [[ ${GIT_REPOURL} != *.git ]]; then
      GIT_REPOURL=${GIT_REPOURL}.git
    fi

    if [ -z "${GIT_USERNAME}" ] && [ -z "${GIT_TOKEN}" ]; then
      echo -e "Git Username or Git Token was not specified."
    else
      GIT_REPOURL="https://${GIT_USERNAME}:${GIT_TOKEN}@$(echo -e ${GIT_REPOURL} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
    fi

    if [ -z ${GIT_BRANCH} ]; then
      echo -e "Cloning default branch into /resources/*."
      git clone ${GIT_REPOURL} /mnt/server/resources
    else
      echo -e "Cloning ${GIT_BRANCH} branch into /resources/*."
      git clone --single-branch --branch ${GIT_BRANCH} ${GIT_REPOURL} /mnt/server/resources && echo "Finished cloning into /resources/* from Git." || echo "Failed cloning into /resources/* from Git."
    fi

  elif [ "${QBCORE_ENABLED}" == "1" ]; then
    install_qbcore_resources

  else
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/resources
    echo "Preparing to clone default FiveM resources."
    git clone https://github.com/citizenfx/cfx-server-data.git /tmp && echo "Downloaded server from git." || echo "Downloading from git failed."
    cp -Rf /tmp/resources/* resources/
  fi

  mkdir -p logs/
  echo "Installation complete."

else
  echo "Beginning update of existing FiveM/RedM FXServer server artifact."

  if [ -d "./alpine/" ]; then
    echo "Deleting old FXServer artifact..."
    rm -r ./alpine/
    while [ -d "./alpine/" ]; do
      sleep 1s
    done
    echo "Deleted old FXServer artifact files successfully."
  fi

  if [[ "${FIVEM_VERSION}" == "recommended" ]] || [[ -z ${FIVEM_VERSION} ]]; then
    DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(echo $CHANGELOGS_PAGE | jq -r '.recommended_download')
  elif [[ "${FIVEM_VERSION}" == "latest" ]]; then
    DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(echo $CHANGELOGS_PAGE | jq -r '.latest_download')
  else
    VERSION_LINK=$(echo -e "${RELEASE_PAGE}" | grep -Eo '".*/*.tar.xz"' | grep -Eo '".*/*.tar.xz"' | sed 's/\"//g'  | sed 's/\.\///1' | grep -i "${FIVEM_VERSION}" | grep -o =.* |  tr -d '=')
    if [[ "${VERSION_LINK}" == "" ]]; then
      echo -e "Defaulting to recommended as the version requested was invalid."
      DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(echo $CHANGELOGS_PAGE | jq -r '.recommended_download')
    else
      DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(echo https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_proot_linux/master/${VERSION_LINK})
    fi
  fi

  echo -e "Running curl -sSL ${DOWNLOAD_LINK} -o ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}..."
  curl -sSL ${DOWNLOAD_LINK} -o ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}

  echo "Extracting FiveM/RedM FXServer artifact files..."
  FILETYPE=$(file -F ',' ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/} | cut -d',' -f2 | cut -d' ' -f2)
  if [ "$FILETYPE" == "gzip" ]; then
    tar xzvf ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}
  elif [ "$FILETYPE" == "Zip" ]; then
    unzip ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}
  elif [ "$FILETYPE" == "XZ" ]; then
    tar xvf ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}
  else
    echo -e "Downloaded artifact of unknown filetype. Exiting."
    exit 2
  fi

  rm -rf ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/} run.sh

  echo "Update complete."
fi

variables.name: CFX Lisans anahtarı
variables.description: Hizmeti başlatmak için gereklidir. anahtarlarınızı su adresten alın: https://portal.cfx.re/

variables.name: Steam Web Api anahtarı
variables.description: Steam WebApiKey'inizi kullanın veya 'none' olarak ayarlayın. anahtarınızı su adresten alın: https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey/

variables.name: FXServer Sürümü
variables.description:
En son veya belirtilen FiveM/RedM FXServer artifact'ini indirir.

'latest', 'recommended' veya belirli bir sürüm olarak ayarlanabilir.
Veya indirmek için doğrudan bir sürüm belirtin, örneğin '25770' veya '1383-e5ea040353ce1b8bc86e37982bf5d888938e3096'.

En son sürümü buradan bulabilirsiniz - https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_proot_linux/master/

'Ayarlar' kısmından 'Sunucuyu Yeniden Kur' tuşuna basmak su anda yüklü olanı kaldıracaktır ve güncellenmiş biriyle değiştirecektir.

variables.name: QBCore Otomatik Kurulum
variables.description: Kurulum sırasında resmi txAdmin QBCore tarifine göre tüm framework kaynaklarını otomatik indirir. Git Enabled açıksa bu ayar yok sayılır.

variables.name: MySQL Bağlantı Dizesi
variables.description: oxmysql veritabani bağlantı dizesi. örnek: mysql://kullanıcı:şifre@127.0.0.1/qbcore?charset=utf8mb4

variables.name: QBCore Dili
variables.description: QBCore dil kodu (örnek: tr, en).

variables.name: Sunucu Dili
variables.description: Sunucu tarayici dili (örnek: tr-TR, en-US).

variables.name: Git Etkin
variables.description: Bunu etkinleştirmek, her sunucu başlangıcında belirtilen depoyu /resources dizinine klonlar veya çeker. Sunucuyu simdi kuruyorsaniz, git deposunu klonlar.

variables.name: Git kullanıcı adı
variables.description: Git ile kimlik doğrulamak için kullanılan kullanıcı adı.

variables.name: Git anahtarı
variables.description:
Git ile kimlik doğrulamak için kullanılan şifre.

Kişisel Erisim anahtarı kullanmak en iyi uygulamadir.
https://github.com/settings/tokens
https://gitlab.com/-/profile/personal_access_tokens

variables.name: Git Depo URL'si
variables.description:
Git deposunun URL'si.

örnek: https://github.com/citizenfx/cfx-server-data

variables.name: Git Dal
variables.description: Kullanmak istediğiniz dalin adı. Belirtilmezse varsayılan dal kullanılır.

variables.name: txAdmin'i Etkinleştir
variables.description:
txAdmin'i etkinleştirir.

(varsayılan: kapali)

variables.name: txAdmin Portu
variables.description: txAdmin panelinin portu.

variables.name: FiveM Oyun Derlemesi
variables.description:
sv_enforceGameBuild convar'ini ayarlar. Sunucunun kullanması gereken istemci GTA derlemesini belirtir. 
Olası degerler için dokumantasyona bakin: https://docs.fivem.net/docs/server-manual/server-commands/#sv_enforcegamebuild-build

variables.name: Maksimum Oyuncu sayısı
variables.description: Maksimum oyuncu sayısını belirler.

variables.name: Sunucu Ana Bilgisayar adı
variables.description: Sunucu tarayıcısında görünen ad.

variables.name: Proje adı
variables.description: Sunucu tarayıcısında görünen ad.

variables.name: Proje Açıklaması
variables.description: Sunucu tarayıcısında görünen aciklama.
variables.default_value: QBCore framework ile kurulmus FiveM roleplay sunucusu.

variables.name: Onesync
variables.description: Onesync'i etkinleştirmek için 'on', devre disi bırakmak için 'off' yapın. Alternatif olarak 'legacy' kullanilabilir ancak önerilmez. Bir sunucu çalıştırıyorsanız Onesync etkin olmalidir.

variables.name: 3D Ses Kullan
variables.description: 3D sesi etkinleştirir veya devre disi birakir. 'UseNativeAudio' true ise etkisizdir.

variables.name: Yalnızca Gönderim Aralığı Kullan
variables.description: Yalnizca gönderim araligini kullanir.

variables.name: Yerel Ses Kullan
variables.description: Yerel sesi etkinleştirir veya devre disi birakir. En iyi VOIP deneyimi için bunu kullanmalısınız. 'Use3dAudio'dan çok daha ustundur.

variables.name: txAdmin Veri Yolu
variables.description: txAdmin'in verileri depoladığı konum.

variables.name: txAdmin Oyun adı
variables.description:
Yalnizca FiveM veya RedM sunucularını çalıştırmakla sinirlar.
Kurulum sayfasi yalnizca asagida belirtilen oyun için tarifler gösterir!
seçenekler: fivem veya redm
